rows.label: tev018101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev018101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Hugo about schematics.

rows.label: tev018101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev018101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Hugo if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev018101_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Hugo about battle probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Hugo if he's heard any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Hugo about battle probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Hugo about battle probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_SEL5011
rows.name: Ask Hugo about battle probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_SEL5021
rows.name: Ask Hugo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG0001
rows.name:
When you find schematics, take them
to the AM terminal in Armory Alley.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you have the necessary materials
on hand as well, you can create new
equipment right then and there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG0003
rows.name:
They're not as good as the things I make, of
course, but regardless, I've heard you can
obtain some pretty great stuff that way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG0006
rows.name:
I had been developing new types of data
probes, but all my work ended up scattered
with the remains of the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG0007
rows.name:
I know they would come in handy on
BLADE missions, but without prototypes,
I couldn't get anyone to help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG0008
rows.name:
If only there was a BLADE somewhere who was
well- acquainted with FrontierNet and willing
to help me resume developing such new probes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG1001
rows.name:
That fuel recovery probe I gave you is a
fantastic first effort in hopefully a whole
series of battle probes, don't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG1002
rows.name:
Set one at a FrontierNet data probe site
and it'll accelerate the pace at which Dolls
parked within that region recover fuel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG1003
rows.name:
The way Dolls burn through fuel, that's got to be
priceless in areas full of strong enemies, right? So
put them to good use and allow me to gather lots of data![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG1008
rows.name:
I've heard talk that there are schematics
for Doll superweapons lurking out there
somewhere. Have you found anything like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG1009
rows.name:
Apparently, the Arts unleashed by those
weapons are an order of magnitude more powerful
than the Arts from conventional weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG1010
rows.name:
Under the right circumstances, they
say they have enough firepower to
bring down a Overed in a single shot![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG1011
rows.name:
If weapons like that really
do exist, I'd sure love to
see 'em in action one day...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG2001
rows.name:
The melee attack probe is a powerful battle
probe that increases the melee attack of
everyone fighting within its range of effect.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG2002
rows.name:
Once you set it, it'll let you take
on even the most well-armored foes
in the region without fear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG2003
rows.name:
You know, I'm pretty close to finishing
the plans for my next battle probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG2004
rows.name:
Come see me again soon, all
right? I'll have another
incredible invention to show you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG3001
rows.name:
If you install that new ranged attack probe I
gave you, everyone within that region will enjoy
the benefits of enhanced ranged attack power.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG3002
rows.name:
Even the weakest of marksmen
will suddenly be shooting like
they were divinely possessed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG3003
rows.name:
Now, what incredible, industry-shaking
battle probe type should I work on next?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG3004
rows.name:
If you're ready for it, please
work with me again! At this point,
you're the only one who will...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG5001
rows.name:
If you install my attribute resistance probe, your
attribute resistances will be boosted for as long as
you're in that region, and you'll take less damage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG5002
rows.name:
It will allow even the most mediocre
of armors to deflect enemy attacks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG5003
rows.name:
All I ask in return is that you
put all of these battle probes
I've given you to effective use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG5004
rows.name:
That's the only way I can prove
there are real-world applications
to my beloved inventions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG5009
rows.name:
Now that I've been blessed with ample materials
and a talented staff, my research and development
projects are coming along quite nicely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG5010
rows.name:
I fell into such deep despair when I lost all
of the battle probe prototypes I had been
working on while on board the White Whale...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG5011
rows.name:
But thanks to you, I was able to
resume my research, and develop
even more advanced versions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018101_MSG5012
rows.name:
I may not be able to fight as you
do, but I'll prove that I can be a
great asset to BLADE in my own way![ST:wait ]
